resources.string: A clock, date, weather and battery on a glass card shaped by a superellipse. Fully generated by AI.

A glass widget card: clock, date, weather and battery. Code, design and logic are fully AI-generated, with no human involvement.

Under the hood
Time: Android moves the hands itself, so the widget does not drain the battery.
Date: formatted in the app language.
Weather: data from Open-Meteo, refreshed every few minutes for your current location.
Battery: read locally, asks for no extra permission.

Tap zones
Weather → a web weather search.
Clock → system alarms.
Date → calendar.
Battery → battery usage.

Access and customization
Permissions: Internet and approximate location, only for the weather. Location can be turned off in settings, then a default point is used.
Visual: language, dimming, transparency and gradient direction are set separately.

AI: claude.ai
Weather: open-meteo.com
